rows.label: qev087703_MSG0001
rows.name:
Your arrival is most welcome,
humans. But how did you...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0002
rows.name: A Larsian named Ni Zain sent us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0003
rows.name:
He was hurt pretty bad, but he
insisted we help you first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems I have been blessed
with exceedingly loyal vassals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0005
rows.name: My prince...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0006
rows.name:
Elma, was it? I would ask your aid
again, if you would offer it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0007
rows.name:
Assist us in destroying the Larsian
Dolls that remain under Growth control.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev087703_SEL0011
rows.name: Aid Ga Derg in destroying the Dolls.

rows.label: qev087703_JNK0020
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev087703_SEL0021
rows.name:
Suggest capturing the Dolls
instead of destroying them.

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0008
rows.name: You have my thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0009
rows.name:
I can abide our machines being
used by such filth no longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0010
rows.name:
When the Growth replicated the
original, they made...changes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0011
rows.name:
Organic sensors within the
replicas lock out Larsian pilots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0012
rows.name:
There is little point in reclaiming
something we can no longer use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0013
rows.name:
Best then to destroy them, so they
cannot be used for further evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0014
rows.name:
Makes sense to me. Let's
go take 'em down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0015
rows.name:
We already destroyed three. That should
leave 10 more somewhere in the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_JNK0030
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev087703_SEL0031
rows.name:
Suggest each of you take out
half the remaining Dolls.

rows.label: qev087703_JNK0040
rows.name: Wager

rows.label: qev087703_SEL0041
rows.name:
Challenge Ga Derg to see who
can destroy six Dolls first.

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0016
rows.name: We will destroy any and all that we see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0017
rows.name:
I ask that you show no mercy
to those you find as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0018
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0019
rows.name: I like this one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0020
rows.name: You will not see us lose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0021
rows.name: Very well. May the hunt begin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087703_MSG0022
rows.name:
We will ensure you only have
to bother with a few...[ST:wait ]
